name: citemind-mobile
description: CiteMind — AI Research Notebook for Mobile

scripts.build:android: npm run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:android:win: npm run sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios: npm run sync:ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release
